sqlMap.select:
select type_id, used from tbl_journal_form_type where tenant_id=#tenantId# and company_id=#companyId#
and used=#used#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_form_type (type_id, used, company_id, tenant_id) values (#typeId#, 'use', #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form_type set used=#used# where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_auth (user_id, dept_id, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #deptId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.select: select form_id, form_name, form_info, form_date, form_writer, form_status from tbl_journal_form where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by form_id asc
select b.dept_id, a.DISPLAYNAME as dept_name from tbl_deptmaster a join tbl_journal_form_user_dept b on a.CN = b.dept_id where b.form_id = #formId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.form_id, a.form_name from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_user_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id) where b.dept_id = #deptId# or b.form_id is null and a.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select distinct a.form_id, a.form_name from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_type b on a.company_id = b.company_id where b.used = 'use' and a.form_status = 'basic' and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_form ( tenant_id, form_name, form_content, type_id, form_date, form_writer, form_info, company_id ) values ( #tenantId#, #formName#, #formContent#, #typeId#, now(), #formWriter#, #formDescript#, #companyId# )
select last_insert_id()
sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1=null
or d.CN=#companyId#
,'##',d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.displayname as text ,case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp ,case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id=#tenantId# and u.CN=#userId# and u.tenant_id=#tenantId# and (((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=0 and d.extensionattribute2=u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=1))
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2=#companyId#
order by DEPTLEVEL

select d.CN as companyId, d.displayname as companyName ,case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id=u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and u.CN=#userId# and u.TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and (((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=0 and d.extensionattribute2=u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,3,1)=1)) and d.extensionattribute2=d.CN order by DEPTLEVEL

select a.user_id as user_id, u.DISPLAYNAME as user_name, u.title as jikwi, du.DISPLAYNAME as dept_name, group_concat(d.DISPLAYNAME separator '%') as auth_dept from jmocha.tbl_usermaster u inner join jmocha.tbl_journal_auth a on (u.CN=a.user_id and u.TENANT_ID=a.tenant_id) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d on (a.dept_id=d.CN and a.tenant_id=d.TENANT_ID) inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster du on (du.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID=du.TENANT_ID) where a.tenant_id=#tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2=#companyId# group by user_id

select d.DISPLAYNAME dept_name, d.CN dept_id from jmocha.tbl_journal_auth a inner join jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d on (d.CN=a.dept_id and a.tenant_id=d.TENANT_ID) where a.user_id = #userId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
select DISPLAYNAME as user_name, CN as user_id, TITLE as jikwi, MAIL as mail, DESCRIPTION as dept_name from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID=#tenantId# and $key$ like concat('%',#value#,'%')
select form_id, form_name, form_info, form_content from tbl_journal_form where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and form_id = #formId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_name = #formName#, form_info = #formDescript#, form_content = #formContent# where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_user_dept where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal_form where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
